chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Family Transfer App. No. S – 05 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.695/2024 (Ex.) 2. For hearing of main case 14.05.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Therefore, this transfer application along with listed application is dismissed in non-prosecution. J U D G E Abdul Basit
